title.title: Paper Title
title.description: Title of the paper limited to 80 characters. It should be unique across the Gateway. Please avoid acronyms wherever possible.
examples: Efficacy of contact tracing for the containment of the 2019 novel coronavirus (COVID-19).

doiandOtherLinks.title: Paper Links
doiandOtherLinks.description: URL endpoint to where can we find this tool or resource

journalTitle.title: Paper journal title
examples: Journal of epidemiology and community health

journalYear.title: Paper Publication Year
journalYear.description: Please provide the paper publication year

abstract.title: Paper Abstract
abstract.description: Please provide a brief summary of the paper.
examples: WhiteRabbit is a small application that can be used to analyze the structure and contents of a database as preparation for designing an ETL. It comes with RabbitInAHat, an application for interactive design of an ETL to the OMOP Common Data Model with the help of the scan report generated by White Rabbit.

resultsInsights.title: Paper Results/Insights
examples: The main goal for CogStack is to provide a generalised way to access the various modes of unstructured data in a clinical record, harmonise them into a common format and index them in Elasticsearch for information retrieval. Ontop Elasticsearch is an NLP pipeline (CogStack MedCat) for information extraction.
resultsInsights.description: Please provide any results or insights about the paper.

gatewayUploaders.title: Uploaders to Innovation Gateway
gatewayUploaders.description: These are the user accounts on the gateway that have permission to edit metadata on the gateway related to the paper being uploaded

relatedResources.title: Related Resources
relatedResources.description: Show relationships to papers, data uses, datasets and tools. Resources must be added to the Gateway first.
examples: The relationships to papers, projects, datasets and tools.

resource.title: Paper Related Resource
resource.description: The identifier of the related resource.

relationship.title: Paper Relationship Between Resources
relationship.description: What is the relationship between these resources?
examples: Covid-19 questionnaire data will be available in this dataset
